description: Learn to structure, style, and build highly interactive, modern client-side web interfaces.
portfolioOutcome: A responsive React app with routing, API integration, and polished UI states.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Internet & Web Protocols
roadmapSteps.description: Understand the fundamental architecture of the web: DNS servers, domain hosting, client-server models, and secure HTTP request lifecycles.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. HTML & CSS Layout Architecture
roadmapSteps.description: Construct pages using semantic tags and style them using modern layout engines like Grid and Flexbox for responsive designs.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. Asynchronous JavaScript & DOM
roadmapSteps.description: Learn modern ES6+ runtime mechanics, asynchronous flows via Promises and async-await, and DOM event bindings.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. CSS Frameworks & Tailwind
roadmapSteps.description: Master modern responsive layout styles using Tailwind CSS utility classes and design system custom tokens.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. TypeScript & Structural Typing
roadmapSteps.description: Bring compile-time type safety to your JavaScript projects by declaring type interfaces, unions, and generics.

roadmapSteps.title: 6. Build Tools & Bundlers
roadmapSteps.description: Compile, bundle, and hot-reload front-end applications efficiently using modern build bundlers.

roadmapSteps.title: 7. React Framework & Hook Models
roadmapSteps.description: Implement complex modular user interfaces using component-driven declarative design, rendering cycles, and state variables.

roadmapSteps.title: 8. State Management & Clients
roadmapSteps.description: Manage shared application state globally and sync it using lightweight modular stores and custom clients.

description: Learn to design APIs, structure relational/non-relational databases, write business logic, and handle scaling.
portfolioOutcome: A documented REST API with authentication, database models, tests, and deployment notes.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. JavaScript Runtime (Node.js)
roadmapSteps.description: Understand writing server-side JavaScript using the Node.js runtime environment, filesystem utilities, and package dependencies.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. REST API Design & Routing
roadmapSteps.description: Build endpoints using correct HTTP methods, payload formats, status codes, query strings, and request parsers.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. Relational Databases (PostgreSQL)
roadmapSteps.description: Design database tables, indexes, constraints, write structured queries, and handle migrations.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. NoSQL Databases (MongoDB)
roadmapSteps.description: Structure unstructured datasets using document-based schemas and index mappings in Mongoose.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. API Authentication & Token Security
roadmapSteps.description: Secure backend resources using JSON Web Tokens (JWT), session cookies, secure storage, and request rate-limiting.

roadmapSteps.title: 6. Caching & Performance
roadmapSteps.description: Optimize resource intensive databases queries and decrease response latency using Redis key-value cache layer.

roadmapSteps.title: 7. Testing & API Documentation
roadmapSteps.description: Write automated unit and integration tests and expose interactive API schema definitions using Swagger.

roadmapSteps.title: 8. Process Management & Deployment
roadmapSteps.description: Keep server runtimes running continuously using process supervisors and deploy isolated Docker containers.

description: Automate build pipelines, orchestrate container clusters, and manage cloud infrastructure reliably.
portfolioOutcome: A containerized app with CI/CD, infrastructure notes, monitoring, and deployment runbook.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Linux Systems & Shell Scripting
roadmapSteps.description: Master Unix directory architectures, process controls, user permissions, network diagnostics, and shell tools.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. Web Servers & Reverse Proxies
roadmapSteps.description: Route client requests to internal networks and handle TLS termination setups on web reverse proxy systems.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. Containerization (Docker)
roadmapSteps.description: Isolate services into lightweight containers. Write custom configurations to compile performant containers.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. Continuous Integration & Pipelines
roadmapSteps.description: Build pipelines that test, build, lint, and deploy code changes dynamically to cluster instances.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Container Orchestration (Kubernetes)
roadmapSteps.description: Manage clusters of containers across distributed networks. Automate scalability and fault tolerance.

roadmapSteps.title: 6. Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
roadmapSteps.description: Provision virtual resources in a descriptive syntax format, enabling repeatable server configurations.

roadmapSteps.title: 7. Cloud Architecture (AWS)
roadmapSteps.description: Architect networks, compute nodes, firewalls, and cloud storage pools within Amazon Web Services.

roadmapSteps.title: 8. Monitoring & Logging Analytics
roadmapSteps.description: Track resource utilization rates and check error log indexes using Prometheus metric scraping servers.

description: Build complete web products by connecting polished frontend experiences with reliable backend services.
portfolioOutcome: A deployed fullstack CRUD product with auth, dashboard, API, database, and responsive UI.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Product Scope & User Flows
roadmapSteps.description: Define product requirements, user roles, data entities, and the main workflows before coding.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. React Application Architecture
roadmapSteps.description: Create reusable pages, layouts, state containers, and form flows for a production-like frontend.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. API & Database Layer
roadmapSteps.description: Design API endpoints, validation rules, database schemas, and error responses.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. Authentication & Protected Features
roadmapSteps.description: Implement login, register, protected routes, token handling, and role-based permissions.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Deployment & Demo Readiness
roadmapSteps.description: Deploy the app, prepare demo accounts, seed data, and document the end-to-end flow.

description: Turn raw data into business insight using spreadsheets, SQL, dashboards, and storytelling.
portfolioOutcome: A dashboard case study with cleaned data, SQL queries, charts, and recommendations.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Spreadsheet Analysis Foundations
roadmapSteps.description: Clean, transform, summarize, and validate tabular data using spreadsheet workflows.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. SQL for Analytics
roadmapSteps.description: Query relational data using filters, joins, aggregations, and window functions.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. Data Visualization Principles
roadmapSteps.description: Choose clear chart types, design dashboards, and avoid misleading visual patterns.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. Business Insight & Storytelling
roadmapSteps.description: Convert analysis into recommendations with context, tradeoffs, and measurable impact.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Portfolio Analytics Case Study
roadmapSteps.description: Create a complete analytics case study with dataset, queries, dashboard, and final recommendations.

description: Research user needs, design usable interfaces, prototype flows, and build consistent design systems.
portfolioOutcome: A UX case study with research notes, wireframes, high-fidelity screens, and prototype link.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. User Research & Problem Discovery
roadmapSteps.description: Understand user goals, pain points, contexts, and constraints before designing screens.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. Information Architecture & User Flows
roadmapSteps.description: Map content, navigation, and task flows so users can complete goals efficiently.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. Wireframing & Interaction Design
roadmapSteps.description: Design low-fidelity screens that communicate layout, hierarchy, and interaction behavior.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. Visual UI & Design Systems
roadmapSteps.description: Create reusable components, tokens, color systems, and accessible UI patterns.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Prototype & UX Case Study
roadmapSteps.description: Build a clickable prototype and document the design process as a portfolio-ready case study.

description: Plan test strategies, write test cases, automate regression checks, and protect product quality.
portfolioOutcome: A QA portfolio with test plan, bug reports, automated tests, and quality summary.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Testing Mindset & QA Process
roadmapSteps.description: Learn how QA protects user outcomes through risk analysis, clear acceptance criteria, and test planning.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. Test Case Design
roadmapSteps.description: Write clear manual test cases for happy paths, edge cases, validation rules, and negative flows.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. API Testing with Postman
roadmapSteps.description: Validate backend endpoints, request payloads, auth flows, and response contracts.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. UI Automation with Playwright
roadmapSteps.description: Automate browser checks for critical user flows and run regression tests reliably.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Bug Reporting & Quality Metrics
roadmapSteps.description: Write actionable bug reports and summarize quality risks for developers and stakeholders.

externalResources.title: How to Write a Bug Report

description: Discover user problems, prioritize roadmap decisions, align stakeholders, and measure product outcomes.
portfolioOutcome: A product case study with discovery notes, roadmap, metrics, and launch plan.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Product Discovery
roadmapSteps.description: Identify valuable problems through user interviews, market signals, and product analytics.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. Prioritization Frameworks
roadmapSteps.description: Choose what to build by balancing impact, confidence, effort, risk, and strategy.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. Roadmap Planning
roadmapSteps.description: Translate product strategy into roadmap themes, releases, and measurable milestones.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. Product Metrics & Experiments
roadmapSteps.description: Define success metrics, read product funnels, and validate decisions with experiments.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Stakeholder Communication
roadmapSteps.description: Write product briefs, align teams, handle tradeoffs, and communicate launch readiness.

description: Build mobile applications with polished navigation, API integration, local storage, and release workflows.
portfolioOutcome: A mobile app prototype with authentication, API data, local persistence, and release notes.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Mobile App Foundations
roadmapSteps.description: Understand mobile constraints, platform patterns, navigation, and touch-first interface expectations.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. Navigation & Screen Architecture
roadmapSteps.description: Structure app screens, tabs, stacks, route params, and protected navigation flows.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. API Integration & App State
roadmapSteps.description: Connect mobile screens to backend APIs, handle loading states, errors, and cached data.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. Device Features & Local Storage
roadmapSteps.description: Use local storage, media picking, permissions, and device APIs safely.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Testing & Release Preparation
roadmapSteps.description: Prepare builds, test core flows, write release notes, and package the app for reviewers.

description: Learn Python, data preparation, model training, evaluation, and practical AI integration for products.
portfolioOutcome: An applied AI project with dataset notes, evaluation metrics, and product integration demo.

roadmapSteps.title: 1. Python for Data Work
roadmapSteps.description: Use Python notebooks, data structures, and libraries to inspect and transform datasets.

roadmapSteps.title: 2. Data Preparation & Feature Thinking
roadmapSteps.description: Clean datasets, handle missing values, engineer features, and avoid leakage.

roadmapSteps.title: 3. Machine Learning Model Basics
roadmapSteps.description: Train baseline models and understand classification, regression, and evaluation metrics.

roadmapSteps.title: 4. AI Product Integration
roadmapSteps.description: Integrate model or AI API outputs into a product workflow with guardrails and clear UX.

roadmapSteps.title: 5. Evaluation & Demo Packaging
roadmapSteps.description: Evaluate model behavior, document limitations, and package the project for stakeholder review.
